title: Iran defends strikes on Gulf neighbors. They say a 'huge trust gap' will last for decades
summary_full: Iran has defended its strikes against its Gulf countries but its neighbors say attacks have damaged trust for a long time.
summary_public: Iran has defended its strikes against its Gulf countries but its neighbors say attacks have damaged trust for a long time.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran defends strikes on Gulf neighbors. They say a 'huge trust gap'
